title: Animation Vanilla +
description:
Animation for a Vanilla Experience

Better Gameplay or just a casual game with your friends

aims for a persons who like Animations in game in a Singleplayer world or in a Server!
body:
Animation Vanilla +, is a ModPack for a better gameplay in Minecraft, includes animations, vfx, optimization mods, and some Resourcepacks 3D for a better gameplay, you can delete or disable mods or resourcepacks if you want!.
The modpack aims for a persons who want to change the old animation of Minecraft and want a FPS BOOST for this!, if you want more mods or resourcepacks you can add too, you can play with your friends in servers or only for a singleplayer world.

Why is a good modpack for a vanilla world?
Mods are only for a better experience (animations, particles and better resorcepacks only)
and doesn't change other things in Minecraft!

THIS MODPACK INCLUDES
-Better VFX
-Animations
-Resourcepacks

You can add more mods for a better vanilla experience
(Have FPS mods like sodium, lithium)
